---
title: "ERA5 / CMIP6 Climate Explorer"
description: "Interactive exploration of ERA5 reanalysis and CMIP6 climate model data for environmental research."
date: "2024-12-01"
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [App, Shiny, Climate Data]
---

## About

A Shiny app for browsing and comparing ERA5 reanalysis data with CMIP6 climate projections. Designed for researchers who need quick access to climate variables across regions and time periods without writing code.

## Live Demo

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://anayananayana.shinyapps.io/ERA5_CMIP6_sample/"
        width="100%" height="650" style="border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:8px;">
</iframe>
```

[Open app in new tab](https://anayananayana.shinyapps.io/ERA5_CMIP6_sample/){.btn .btn-primary}

## Stack

[R]{.badge-skill} [Shiny]{.badge-skill} [Climate Data]{.badge-skill} [ERA5]{.badge-skill}
